scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --import tsx --test --test-force-exit test/*.test.ts
scripts.test:browser: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --import tsx --test --test-force-exit test/browser-smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:server: npm run typecheck && node --import tsx --test test/server.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: npm run typecheck && node --import tsx --test test/finish-time.test.ts test/i18n.test.ts test/planner.test.ts test/stations.test.ts
scripts.start: npm run build && node --import tsx server.ts
